## Summary

Describe the public beta change and the user-facing workflow it affects.

## Verification

- [ ] Documentation-only change, or tests/builds run:
- [ ] Public copy remains beta-focused and targets AI coding users or existing Codex CLI users.
- [ ] No pricing, subscription, legal, App Store submission, or privacy-label claim was added without maintainer approval.

## Privacy Audit

- [ ] No private names, email addresses, hostnames, local usernames, machine-specific paths, tokens, or private screenshots are included.
- [ ] Screenshots, logs, and examples use demo data only.
- [ ] Support/debugging copy tells users to remove credentials, gateway URLs, account names, local paths, private prompts, and live desktop contents before sharing.
